prompt: change the view in the window into a view on mars
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Replace the existing orbital view of Earth and the visible International Space Station components within the spacecraft windows with a photorealistic, orbital view of the planet Mars. The view should clearly depict Mars's distinctive reddish-orange surface, craters, and thin atmosphere, maintaining the original lighting and perspective. Ensure the interior spacecraft elements and the window frames remain unchanged.
objects: orbital view of Earth (should not be present)
International Space Station components (should not be present)
